## Summary

Describe the user or developer impact and why this change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`

## Security and Data

State whether this changes HTML rendering, external requests, document transmission, credentials, or persistence.
